caveats: Genomics domain labels may differ across jurisdictions.

This is a parser/rendering fixture, not a cross-jurisdiction price comparison.
Pooled prices require harmonised currency year, price concept, component, bundle and unit.
metric_summary: Compared genomics items across 6 sources; 4 items found, 50.0% with a public schedule amount. No pooled payment statistic is calculated across unharmonised sources.
title: Genomics and pathology coverage and price comparison

title: Cognitive versus procedural fee relativities
